title: Cut Out for This
caption: The face hole did not ask if she was ready. She was ready.

title: Lot of Romance
caption: Stunning Gulf sunset. Real couple. One Toyota Camry absolutely refusing to leave the frame. You had one job, parking lot.

title: Putting Your Best Foot Forward
caption: (And the other one too.) Feet up, Gulf out, fully offline. Podiatrists hate this one weird vacation trick.

title: Just One Drink
caption: Studies show at least one person in this photo said 'just one drink.' Studies show they were wrong. The dartboard has no comment.

title: Cobble-Stone Cold Stunner
caption: The cobblestones were just sitting there, minding their own business. She made them iconic. They did not resist.

title: Getting Brass-y
caption: No photo, no alibi. She came, she saw, she documented it for the record. Notarized by vibe.

title: Bee-ach, Please
caption: She crouched in wet sand to write this. The Gulf read it. Nobody regrets anything.

title: Pair-a-dise Found
caption: Golden hour fell directly on this patio. Second round incoming. Zero complaints on record.

title: Rafter All That
caption: Rustic-core achieved. The exposed beams set the vibe. They caught it immediately.
